_description: Target companies for direct ATS board polling. Primary discovery source — preferred over WebSearch because ATS JSON endpoints return structured, fresh, deduplicated data with no 403/JS issues.

_websearch_sources.description: Supplemental discovery sources run via WebSearch each daily pipeline run. Use these to find companies NOT on the ATS watchlist, especially Atlanta startups.

sources.name: Hypepotamus Job Board
sources.query: site:hypepotamus.com/job-board customer success OR technical account OR implementation OR success engineer
sources.notes: Atlanta startup-focused job board and newsletter. Best source for small/unknown Atlanta companies not on ATS watchlist. Free board — may have lower salary floor, screen carefully.

sources.name: BuiltIn Atlanta
sources.query: site:builtin.com/job "customer success" OR "technical account" OR "implementation manager" Atlanta
sources.notes: Aggregates Atlanta tech companies including startups. Good mid-size company coverage that complements Hypepotamus.

sources.name: Wellfound Atlanta
sources.query: site:wellfound.com customer success OR technical account manager Atlanta Georgia startup
sources.notes: Formerly AngelList. Best source for early-stage startups, Series A/B. Skews toward equity-heavy comp — verify salary floor before tailoring.

_scoring_config.notes: Light tailoring for IC-level roles 78-87. Full tailoring for 88+. Skip below 78. Capped companies require 110+ regardless of tier.
